prompt: Generate a trend report for the project. I want the report in English. Skip claim verification and copywriting.
assertions: tips-trend-report.md exists in the project directory
tips-trend-report-claims.json exists in the project directory
Report has valid YAML frontmatter with report_mode: strategic-themes
Report contains 5 H2 theme sections matching the value model themes
Report contains an emerging signals section
Report contains a portfolio analysis section with theme overview table
Report contains a claims registry table
Claims JSON has at least 20 claims
All 4 enriched-trends JSON files exist in .logs/
All 4 claims JSON files exist in .logs/
All 4 report-section markdown files exist in .logs/
Report language is English -- headings use English labels
Title does not contain redundant subsector suffix
Each investment thesis section has at least 250 words and 3 citations
